CREATE TABLE test_shift (value1 INT, value2 INT);
SELECT bit_shift(value1, value2) FROM test_shift WHERE value1 > 0;
SELECT bit_shift(value1, value2) FROM test_shift WHERE value1 < 0;
SELECT value1, value2, bit_shift(value1, value2) AS shifted_value FROM test_shift;
SELECT bit_shift(value1, 31) FROM test_shift WHERE value1 BETWEEN 1 AND 100;
SELECT bit_shift(value1, value2) FROM (SELECT value1, value2 FROM test_shift) AS subquery;
SELECT bit_shift(value1, value2) FROM test_shift ORDER BY value1 DESC;
SELECT COUNT(*), bit_shift(value1, value2) FROM test_shift GROUP BY bit_shift(value1, value2);
SELECT DISTINCT bit_shift(value1, value2) FROM test_shift;
SELECT bit_shift(value1, 0) FROM test_shift WHERE value1 = 1;
SELECT bit_shift(value1, 2) FROM (SELECT value1 FROM test_shift WHERE value1 < 100) AS temp;
SELECT bit_shift(t1.value1, t2.value2) FROM test_shift AS t1 JOIN test_shift AS t2 ON t1.value1 = t2.value1 WHERE t1.value2 > 0;
WITH shifted AS (SELECT value1, value2, bit_shift(value1, value2) AS shift_result FROM test_shift) SELECT * FROM shifted WHERE shift_result > 0;
